what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata stub for a JPEG image asset named p-13 located in the design-source/recent-pitches channel; it records the asset's id, address, blob reference, MIME type, source label, authoring session, creation timestamp, and an empty links list.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares an image asset with id recent-pitches/p-13 and address image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-13
The blob is referenced as blob://b2:c12e86bb164fe6588ebe91c4a0902c5c with mime image/jpeg
Width and height are both recorded as 0
The source field is design_source_material and the author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body line reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-13.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions w and h are 0 despite the file representing a JPEG
The blob reference is present but there is no inline image content or description
It is explicitly labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of ledger fields (id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, w, h, source, author_session, created, links)
Uses URI-style identifiers: image://... and blob://...
Includes a short plain-text body caption identifying the source material
concerns: Zero width and height for an image asset may indicate missing or unextracted metadata
No descriptive content, alt text, or thumbnail reference
No links to related pitches, designs, or sessions
Provenance is limited to an opaque session id
notes: A minimal ledger stub for a design-source pitch image that records identity and blob location but lacks dimensions, description, and relationships.
questions: What visual content does p-13.jpg contain?
Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
Which specific pitch or project does this image belong to?
How does this asset relate to other recent-pitches/p-NN entries?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record SOURCE design ground-truth for recent-pitches/p-13.jpg, and the file does exactly that as a metadata ledger entry.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register and preserve a design-source image pitch asset in a stable, queryable ledger with a unique id, blob pointer, and creation attribution.
novelty: The only unusual aspect is that an image ledger entry records width and height as 0 while otherwise following a standard metadata stub format.
contribution: This file contributes a canonical id, address, and blob reference for image asset p-13 plus creation metadata, which a fused system can use for retrieval and provenance tracking.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata stub for the design-source JPEG image recent-pitches/p-13.jpg with blob reference, MIME type, source label, author session, and creation timestamp, but zero width and height and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and provide a stable reference for a design-source pitch image asset.
